data.title: Bitwise Donates $150,000 To Support Bitcoin Developers
data.description: According to PANews, asset management firm Bitwise has donated $150,000 to Bitcoin open-source developers to aid in maintaining and strengthening the Bitcoin network. This donation marks the first annual contribution following Bitwise's commitment to donate 10% of its gross profits each year upon the launch of its Bitwise Bitcoin ETF (BITB). The funds will be distributed among three nonprofit organizations: Brink, OpenSats, and the Human Rights Foundation. Bitwise has indicated that as the BITB grows, future donations will increase to provide long-term support for the Bitcoin ecosystem.

data.title: Coinbase International will launch EURC perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Coinbase International Station posted on the X platform that Coinbase International Exchange and Coinbase Advanced will add support for EURC perpetual futures contracts, and the EURC-PERP market will be open on or after 9:30 am UTC on February 19, 2025.

data.title: CoinDesk 20 Index Sees Decline With Mixed Asset Performance
data.description:
According to CoinDesk, the CoinDesk 20 Index experienced a decline, closing at 3183.11, which marks a 1.4% decrease, or a drop of 46.75 points, since 4 p.m. ET on Monday. This index, which is a comprehensive measure of the cryptocurrency market, is traded across various platforms worldwide.

Within the CoinDesk 20, only two out of the twenty assets showed positive performance. Leading the gains, Litecoin (LTC) rose by 4.9%, while Bitcoin (BTC) saw a modest increase of 0.3%. These assets managed to buck the overall downward trend observed in the index.

Conversely, several assets underperformed, contributing to the index's overall decline. Among the laggards, Aptos (APT) fell by 5.6%, and Solana (SOL) decreased by 5.1%. These declines highlight the volatility and mixed performance within the cryptocurrency market as reflected in the CoinDesk 20 Index.

data.title: Bitcoin Mining Firm MARA Acquires Texas Wind Farm to Expand Energy Infrastructure
data.description: According to Odaily, Bitcoin mining company MARA has announced the acquisition of a wind farm in Texas. This purchase will add 114 megawatts of wind power capacity to MARA's energy infrastructure assets. The company plans to utilize the latest generation of ASIC mining hardware powered by renewable energy to reduce Bitcoin production costs. MARA is the second-largest publicly traded Bitcoin holder, with 45,659 BTC on its balance sheet.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 650 USDT with a 4.21% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 18, 2025, 15:18 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 650 USDT and is now trading at 649.900024 USDT, with a narrowed 4.21% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Bitwise Donates $150,000 to Support Bitcoin Open Source Developers
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto asset management company Bitwise announced on the X platform that it donated $150,000 to support Bitcoin open source developers. When the Bitwise Bitcoin ETF ($BITB) was launched, it promised to donate 10% of its gross profit each year. Bitwise said it was pleased to fulfill this commitment through its first annual donation. Three organizations will allocate relevant funds, namely Brink, OpenSats, and the Human Rights Foundation.

data.title: US judge rules Musk team can access US Department of Education systems
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to market news, a US judge ruled that Musk's team can access the US Department of Education's system. (Jinshi)

data.title: Arthur Hayes: Politicians abandoning their supporters may have no consequences in the crypto space, but may affect their political careers
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes posted on the X platform, "The game is the game. If you are a politician, betraying your supporters may have no consequences in the crypto field, but your political career may be affected. Whether it is worth it depends on whether you value your supporters."

data.title: Uniswap Labs posts hint at support for Monad Network
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Uniswap Labs posted a message on the X platform suggesting that it will support the Monad network, including the integration of Uniswap wallets and web applications.

data.title: Market News: Google is exploring ways to simplify BTC adoption
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to market news, search giant Google is exploring ways to simplify BTC adoption.
